name: Chocolate Marble Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the 1/3 cup butter and sugar together.
2. Add the well-beaten eggs and mix well.
3. Sift flour and baking powder, then add alternately with milk to the butter mixture.
4. Divide batter into two bowls. To one bowl, add 1 tablespoon melted butter and chocolate; stir until combined.
5. To the other bowl, add vanilla extract; stir until combined.
6. Pour the white batter and chocolate batter alternately into a greased cake pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 40 minutes.
